game_info.title: Ridiculous Fishing - A Tale of Redemption
game_info.concept: **Ridiculous Fishing - A Tale of Redemption** Players initiate a fishing attempt by tapping to cast, then tilt their device left and right to steer the lure, avoiding all fish as it descends to reach maximum depth, which can extend to over 500 units. Once the lure hits a fish or reaches its maximum depth, it automatically begins ascending, and players must rapidly tap the screen to fire their equipped weapon, shooting as many fish as possible that appear on screen. Each caught fish converts into cash based on its rarity and size (e.g., a common fish yields 5 coins, a rare one 50), which players use in a shop UI to purchase upgrades like longer fishing lines (increasing max depth by 50 units), faster lures (increasing descent speed by 15%), and more powerful weapons (increasing projectile count by 1 or damage by 20%). Reaching specific cumulative cash milestones (e.g., 1000, 5000, 10000 coins) or catching unique fish species unlocks new fishing locations (continents), each featuring distinct fish populations, increased depth limits, and more challenging fish patterns during descent and ascent. The primary objective is to complete Billy's narrative journey by progressing through all fishing spots, catching all 60+ unique fish species, and fully upgrading all available equipment to maximize catch efficiency and income.
game_info.description: Cast your line and descend into the depths! Steer your lure to avoid fish on the way down to reach maximum depth. Once you hook a fish or hit bottom, rapidly shoot fish on the way up to earn cash. Use your earnings to upgrade your line length, lure speed, and weapons. Progress through different fishing locations by reaching cash milestones and catching unique species. Complete Billy's redemption by mastering all locations and maxing out your equipment!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Steer lure during descent
Space: Shoot weapon during ascent
Z: Cast line / Continue through screens
Shift: Open shop (when at surface)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and mechanics test. Validates that the player can cast, steer the lure, descend, ascend, and shoot fish. Tests basic collision detection and state transitions.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Cast the line, steer randomly during descent to test movement, let the lure hit a fish or reach max depth, then shoot randomly during ascent. Repeat the cycle to test multiple fishing attempts.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully completes multiple fishing cycles without errors. The player should accumulate some cash from caught fish, and all game phases should transition correctly (SURFACE → DESCENDING → ASCENDING → SURFACE).

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Tests the optimal strategy to complete the game by progressing through all locations, catching fish efficiently, and fully upgrading equipment to reach the win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use intelligent steering to avoid fish during descent and reach maximum depth. During ascent, prioritize shooting rare and valuable fish. Purchase upgrades strategically (line length first, then weapon power, then speed). Progress through all locations by reaching cash milestones.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by unlocking all locations, catching sufficient unique species, and maxing out all equipment upgrades. The final cash total should exceed 15000 coins, demonstrating mastery of the game mechanics.

TEST_3.test_description: Shop and upgrade system test. Validates that purchasing upgrades correctly modifies player stats and that the shop UI functions properly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Earn cash through basic fishing, then systematically purchase each upgrade type to verify they apply correctly. Test edge cases like insufficient funds and maxed-out upgrades.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: All upgrades purchase successfully when funds are available, stats increase as expected, and the shop prevents invalid purchases. The game balance should show noticeable improvement with each upgrade tier.
